Our work

Custom PC Builds

Every machine we build is hand-assembled with premium components, immaculate cable management, and full RGB tuning — built to perform and built to impress.

RGB liquid-cooled build · Cooler Master + Montech case
Triple-fan air-cooled build · Full ARGB setup

Our gear

DJI Air 3S — Eyes in the sky

We fly the DJI Air 3S, one of the most capable drones available — a 1-inch sensor, front-facing LiDAR, and omnidirectional obstacle sensing for safe, cinematic results every time.

Main sensor1-inch CMOS
Video resolution4K / 60fps
Max flight time46 minutes
Transmission range20 km
Obstacle sensingOmnidirectional
Wind resistanceLevel 7
Front sensorLiDAR
Stabilization3-axis gimbal

What we do

Services

From aerial cinematography to fully custom PC builds, we cover everything with the same obsession for quality and precision.

Aerial photography

Stunning 4K stills and video from above — real estate, events, land surveys, and cinematic productions.

Drone videography

Smooth cinematic footage for commercial projects, weddings, sports events, and content creation.

Custom PC builds

Tailored desktops built from hand-picked components — gaming rigs, workstations, and everything in between.

PC repair & upgrades

Diagnostics, component swaps, GPU & RAM upgrades, deep cleaning, and full performance tuning.
